settings.hero_subtitle: Phone booths, acoustic pods, and focus room furniture for institutional open-plan environments. OECM-eligible.
settings.intro_text: Open offices are productive — until they're not. Brant Business Interiors carries phone booths, multi-person acoustic pods, and high-back privacy seating that give people a place to focus and take confidential calls. No construction required. OECM Agreement 2025-470. Quote in 1 business day.
